items.title_en: In photos: Trump lands in China ahead of high-stakes summit with Xi
items.title_zh: 照片中：特朗普在与习近平举行高风险峰会之前抵达中国
items.desc_en: The high-stakes summit is expected to cover a wide range of contentious topics, including trade, technology, export controls, Taiwan, and the Iran war.

items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席

items.desc_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 是历史上所有美联储主席中获得最少票数的人。会削弱他吗？

items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统警告俄罗斯周三将发动“更多波次”袭击后，袭击仍在继续。

items.title_en: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
items.title_zh: 接触汉坦病毒后，一名妇女在南太平洋英国岛屿上被隔离
items.desc_en: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.
items.desc_zh: 英国海外领土皮特凯恩群岛政府表示，在一艘受病毒袭击的船上的妇女“没有任何生病的迹象”。

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes on cars in southern Lebanon kill 12, health ministry says
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部称以色列对黎巴嫩南部汽车的袭击造成 12 人死亡
items.desc_en: Two children are among those reported dead after seven cars were struck in separate attacks south of Beirut.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，贝鲁特以南七辆汽车被撞，造成两名儿童死亡。

items.title_en: Trump arrives in China for high-stakes meeting with Xi Jinping
items.title_zh: 特朗普抵达中国与习近平进行重要会晤
items.desc_en: The leaders of the global superpowers are expected to discuss the war in Iran, tariffs, AI and Taiwan during the two-day visit.
items.desc_zh: 全球超级大国领导人预计将在为期两天的访问中讨论伊朗战争、关税、人工智能和台湾问题。

items.title_en: Epstein abused me while under house arrest, survivor tells US lawmakers
items.title_zh: 幸存者告诉美国立法者，爱泼斯坦在软禁期间虐待我
items.desc_en: Roza was among several victims who gave testimony to Democratic lawmakers on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 罗扎是周二向民主党议员作证的几名受害者之一。

items.title_en: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司(BBC)调查后，乌干达数十只狗获救，嫌疑人被捕
items.desc_en: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的一项调查揭露了诈骗者如何发布陷入困境的狗的社交内容，以欺骗捐赠者捐款。

items.title_en: Trump arrives in Beijing with CEOs ahead of Xi meetings
items.title_zh: 特朗普在习近平会议前与首席执行官抵达北京
items.desc_en: The president landed in the Chinese capital for a highly anticipated summit with Xi Jinping.
items.desc_zh: 总统抵达中国首都，与习近平举行备受期待的峰会。

items.title_en: Philippine Senate in lockdown after gunshots fired
items.title_zh: 菲律宾参议院因枪击事件被封锁
items.desc_en: Police commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.
items.desc_zh: 警察突击队进入了一名被国际刑事法院通缉的参议员寻求庇护的大楼。

items.title_en: What to know as Trump visits Xi in China
items.title_zh: 特朗普访华习近平时需要了解什么
items.desc_en: Trump has landed in Beijing for the first visit by a US leader since his own in 2017.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普抵达北京，这是自2017年以来美国领导人首次访问北京。

items.title_en: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase in four years
items.title_zh: 4月份批发通胀同比上涨6%，创四年来最大增幅
items.desc_en: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识，预计 4 月份生产者价格指数将上涨 0.5%。

items.title_en: More than 1,000 passengers held on cruise in France after gastroenteritis outbreak
items.title_zh: 法国邮轮爆发肠胃炎 逾千名乘客滞留
items.desc_en: The ship, which set sail from Belfast on Friday, is at port in Bordeaux after 49 people fell ill from gastroenteritis.
items.desc_zh: 这艘船于周五从贝尔法斯特起航，目前停泊在波尔多港口，此前有 49 人患有肠胃炎。

items.title_en: Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of ice
items.title_zh: 登山者通过巨大的冰块开辟了通往珠穆朗玛峰顶峰的道路
items.desc_en: Nearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.
items.desc_zh: 近 1,000 名登山者将在未来几周内尝试攀登珠峰，这引发了安全担忧。

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Mortgage rates move to highest level in 5 weeks, but homebuyers shake it off
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率升至五周以来最高水平，但购房者摆脱了困境
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates continued to climb higher, but stronger homebuyer demand helped to keep mortgage applications in positive territory.
items.desc_zh: 抵押贷款利率继续攀升，但强劲的购房者需求有助于使抵押贷款申请保持在正值区间。

items.title_en: Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German court
items.title_zh: 德国法院称，缩小的米尔卡巧克力棒欺骗了消费者
items.desc_en: A court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".
items.desc_zh: 不莱梅一家法院判定经典阿尔卑斯牛奶巧克力棒的制造商犯有“收缩通货膨胀”罪。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.title_en: War in Iran costs $29 billion so far. And, students are finally improving in math - NPR

items.title_en: Gas tax holiday as Trump promises? Not so fast, trucking, construction industries say
items.title_zh: 特朗普承诺的汽油税假期？卡车运输和建筑行业表示，速度并没有那么快
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump and lawmakers are eyeing federal gas tax relief, but opponents argue a pause wouldn't help consumers and could harm roads.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统和立法者正在考虑减免联邦汽油税，但反对者认为暂停不会帮助消费者，还可能损害道路。

items.title_en: Ghana to evacuate 300 from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
items.title_zh: 加纳因反移民抗议将从南非撤离300人
items.desc_en: The foreign minister says the "distressed" Ghanaians registered with the embassy in Pretoria to be evacuated.
items.desc_zh: 外交部长表示，“陷入困境的”加纳人已在比勒陀利亚大使馆登记准备撤离。

items.title_en: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.title_zh: 向寻求虐待儿童材料的人们发出了超过 7000 万条警告

items.desc_zh: 这些消息强调人们在网上搜索的内容是非法的，并引导他们寻求帮助。
